questions.text: What is the key advantage of Rotary Position Embeddings (RoPE) over absolute sinusoidal encodings?
options: It encodes relative distance properties naturally when calculating Query-Key dot products.
It functions only in the log domain.
questions.correct_answer: It encodes relative distance properties naturally when calculating Query-Key dot products.
questions.explanation: Because RoPE rotates the 2D slices of key and query vectors, the dot product of two rotated vectors depends only on their relative distance (m - n).
